title: Aegis Statusline Theme (Palette)
description: One palette per file under statuslines/_shared/themes/<name>.json. Inherits claude-hud's colors.* key map verbatim as the leaf type. Themes are additive — ship more without bumping the schema.

name.description: Palette name. Must match the filename (minus .json) and the `theme` field presets reference.

colors.description: claude-hud colors.* key map. Recommended keys: label, model, project, git, gitDirty, context, contextBar, usage, usageBar, cost, prompt, prompts, warning, critical, muted, accent, separator. Unknown keys are permitted (additive). Every value is a color (named ANSI, 256-color index, or hex).

bar.description: Bar glyphs for context/usage segments. Each glyph is a single grapheme. Defaults: filled '█', empty '░'.

color.description: A color value: named ANSI, 256-color index (0-255), or 6-digit hex.

glyph.description: A single display grapheme (maxLength accommodates multibyte/combining sequences).
